axes.description: Number of concrete repo artifacts created or updated.
Distinct categories touched: code, tests, docs, workflow, config, ops, schema, examples.
Presence of OAK boundaries, residues, anti-overclaim gates and review-only protections.
Workflows, validators, scripts and repeatable commands.
Unit tests, validation scripts and measurable outputs.
Connection to high-value Tristan modules and future leverage.
Reusable configs, manifests, templates, batch prompts, and examples.
